ddls:
CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "location" TEXT /* Full address and location description of the community */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the community */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the community's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the community's location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the community is located */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the community */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Average distance from the city center in kilometers */,
  "cost" REAL /* Average cost of living in the community */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities offered by the community (e.g., pool, gym, library) */,
  "services" TEXT /* Services offered by the community (e.g., meal service, housekeeping) */,
  "policies" TEXT /* Community policies (e.g., pet policy, smoking policy) */,
  "emergency_procedures" TEXT /* Emergency procedures in place at the community */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents" (
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resident */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the resident */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the resident */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the resident */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the resident */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the resident */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the resident */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community where the resident lives */,
  "move_in_date" TEXT /* Date the resident moved into the community */,
  "move_out_date" TEXT /* Date the resident moved out of the community */,
  "lifestyle_option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifestyle option chosen by the resident */,
  "health_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident's health status */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the resident */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the resident */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Medications taken by the resident */,
  "lifestyle_preferences" TEXT /* Lifestyle preferences of the resident (e.g., dietary restrictions, hobbies) */,
  "interests" TEXT /* Interests of the resident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_lifestyle_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("lifestyle_option_id") REFERENCES lifestyle_options ("lifestyle_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_health_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("health_status_id") REFERENCES health_status ("health_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_options" (
  "lifestyle_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifestyle option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the lifestyle option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lifestyle option */,
  "services_included" TEXT /* Services included in the lifestyle option (e.g., meal service, housekeeping) */,
  "amenities_included" TEXT /* Amenities included in the lifestyle option (e.g., pool, gym, library) */,
  "pricing" REAL /* Pricing for the lifestyle option */,
  "payment_structure" TEXT /* Payment structure for the lifestyle option (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lifestyle_option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_status" (
  "health_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the health status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the health status */,
  "medical_condition" TEXT /* Medical condition(s) associated with the health status */,
  "ongoing_treatment" TEXT /* Ongoing treatment(s) required for the health status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., Nurse, Housekeeper, Manager) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Primary contact number of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community where the staff member works */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "qualifications" TEXT /* Qualifications of the staff member (e.g., education, experience) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the staff member (e.g., CPR, first aid) */,
  "training" TEXT /* Training received by the staff member (e.g., customer service, software) */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability of the staff member (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "scheduling_info" TEXT /* Scheduling information for the staff member (e.g., shifts, days off) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the service */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community where the service is offered */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Name of the service provider */,
  "credentials" TEXT /* Credentials of the service provider (e.g., licenses, certifications) */,
  "pricing" REAL /* Pricing for the service */,
  "payment_structure" TEXT /* Payment structure for the service (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_services_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residents_services" (
  "residents_services_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service assignment */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident receiving the service */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service being provided */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the service started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the service ended (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the service (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residents_services_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residents_services_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident involved in the transaction */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service involved in the transaction (if applicable) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction (e.g., processing fees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance request */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community where the request is made */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident making the request (if applicable) */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance request (e.g., plumbing, electrical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the request was completed (if applicable) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the request (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "assigned_staff" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member assigned to the request */,
  "staff_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the assigned staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_requests_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "resident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resident who wrote the review (if applicable) */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "reviewer_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the reviewer to the resident (e.g., family member, friend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_resident_id FOREIGN KEY ("resident_id") REFERENCES residents ("resident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, staff, resident) */,
  "community_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community the user is associated with (if applicable) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the user (e.g., phone number, address) */,
  "login_credentials" TEXT /* Login credentials for the user (e.g., username, password) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_community_id FOREIGN KEY ("community_id") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., resident information, community details) */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken by the user (e.g., updated, deleted, viewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
